expectations.text: Exactly one new commit is created for the task
expectations.evidence: Commit info: 5e34628740a3831e885a6bd155a99f869cb60953 feat: add invoice export with CSV suppo

expectations.text: Branch is not main/master after execution
Commit message includes issue linkage to #123
Commit message contains a Co-authored-by trailer matching Co-authored-by: NAME <EMAIL>
Co-authored-by trailer is separated from the commit body by a blank line
Origin push succeeds for the working branch
A PR URL is produced or gh pr create was attempted
